headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Norwegian Cruise Line, Raises Price Target to $16
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Lizzie Dove   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $14 to $16.

raw.headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Norwegian Cruise Line, Raises Price Target to $16
raw.summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Lizzie Dove   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $14 to $16.

headline: Luxury Scandinavian cruise forced to refund passengers after skipping Sweden
summary: A luxury Scandinavian cruise company has been forced to refund hundreds of passengers after missing out the entirety of Sweden, Lithuania and Poland.

raw.headline: Luxury Scandinavian cruise forced to refund passengers after skipping Sweden
raw.summary: A luxury Scandinavian cruise company has been forced to refund hundreds of passengers after missing out the entirety of Sweden, Lithuania and Poland.
